meaning: vi.绮橀檮,鑳剁潃,鍧氭寔v.鍧氭寔
examples: One must be duly self-disciplined to adhere to it.
Small particles adhere to the seed.
All members of the association adhere to a strict code of practice.
Surely, their size and placement is standard and most cabinet makers adhere to the rules.
"We would also remind motorists to adhere to all direction given by PSNI, " he said.
